# `unity projects` command reference

Generated from Unity CLI `1.0.0-beta.2` help output.

Installed help is authoritative; this file is a versioned snapshot.

## unity projects

- CLI version: `1.0.0-beta.2`
- Supported platforms: macos
- Aliases: `p`

Manage Unity projects in the Hub registry

### Usage

`unity projects|p [options] [command]`

### Subcommands

| Name | Aliases | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `list` | — | List Unity projects registered in the Hub |
| `add` | — | Register existing Unity project folders in the Hub registry |
| `remove` | — | Remove projects from the Hub registry (does not delete files on disk) |
| `info` | — | Show details for a local Unity project. Defaults to the current directory; pass a path or a name registered with the Hub. |
| `create` | — | Create a new Unity project and register it in the Hub |
| `clone` | — | Clone a remote repository and register the Unity project it contains |
| `link` | — | Connect a local project to its cloud or version-control link |
| `new` | — | Create a new Unity project (non-interactive, CI-friendly) |
| `open` | — | Open a Unity project by name, fuzzy title match, or path |
| `pin` | — | Pin (favorite) one or more projects by name or path pattern |
| `unpin` | — | Unpin (unfavorite) one or more projects by name or path pattern |
| `require` | — | Assert that the required editor version is installed, installing it if necessary |
| `unlink` | — | Disconnect a local project from its cloud or version-control link |
| `upgrade` | — | Upgrade a Unity project to a different editor version |
| `export` | — | Export the Hub project list to a JSON file |
| `import` | — | Import a Hub project list from a previously exported JSON file |

### Positional arguments

None.

### Options

| Option | Value | Required | Repeatable | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h`, `--help` | — | False | False | — | display help for command |
| `-V`, `--version` | — | False | False | — | output the version number |
| `--format` | `<format>` | False | False | — | Output format: human, json, tsv, ndjson (env: UNITY_FORMAT) |
| `--no-banner` | — | False | False | — | Suppress the startup banner (env: UNITY_NO_BANNER) |
| `--non-interactive` | — | False | False | — | Disable interactive prompts. Useful in CI/CD environments. (env: UNITY_NON_INTERACTIVE) |
| `--quiet` | — | False | False | — | Suppress informational output (env: UNITY_QUIET) |
| `--verbose` | — | False | False | — | Show full error details including stack traces on failure (env: UNITY_VERBOSE) |
| `--proxy` | `<url>` | False | False | — | HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS/PAC proxy URL. Examples: http://user:pass@host:8080, socks5://host:1080, pac+http://wpad/proxy.pac (env: UNITY_PROXY) |
| `--proxy-disable` | — | False | False | — | Disable proxy for this invocation, ignoring all sources |
| `--log-proxy` | — | False | False | — | Log every outbound request to proxy-request.json for this run. Off by default; typically used once when reproducing a proxy issue for support. Also settable via UNITY_LOG_PROXY=1 or the proxyRequestLogging user setting. (env: UNITY_LOG_PROXY) |
| `--no-log-proxy` | — | False | False | — | Opt out of --log-proxy / UNITY_LOG_PROXY / the persisted user setting for this run. Use when logging is enabled globally but you want one clean invocation. |

### Environment variables

| Variable | Description |

| `UNITY_NO_BANNER` | Mirrors --no-banner. |

## unity projects clone

- CLI version: `1.0.0-beta.2`
- Supported platforms: macos
- Aliases: None

Clone a remote repository and register the Unity project it contains

### Usage

`unity projects clone [options]`

### Subcommands

None.

### Positional arguments

None.

### Options

| Option | Value | Required | Repeatable | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--vcs` | `<provider>` | False | False | — | Source control provider: github, gitlab, or uvcs |
| `--vcs-namespace` | `<name>` | False | False | — | GitHub organization, GitLab group, or Unity Version Control organization |
| `--vcs-repo` | `<name>` | False | False | — | Repository name (github/gitlab) or repository identity (uvcs) |
| `--ref` | `<branch|sha|changeset>` | False | False | — | Branch, commit, or changeset to check out (an all-digits UVCS ref is read as a changeset) |
| `--path` | `<dest>` | False | False | — | Destination directory for the clone; defaults to the default projects folder |
| `--project-path` | `<subpath>` | False | False | — | Subpath of the project to register when the repository holds more than one |
| `--git-token` | `<pat>` | False | False | — | Personal access token (github/gitlab); prefer --git-token-stdin or env vars in CI |
| `--git-token-stdin` | — | False | False | — | Read the personal access token from stdin (CI-safe) |
| `--no-lfs` | — | False | False | — | Skip downloading Git LFS assets; leave pointer files in place |
| `--json` | — | False | False | — | Output result as JSON |
| `-h`, `--help` | — | False | False | — | display help for command |
| `-V`, `--version` | — | False | False | — | output the version number |
| `--format` | `<format>` | False | False | — | Output format: human, json, tsv, ndjson (env: UNITY_FORMAT) |
| `--no-banner` | — | False | False | — | Suppress the startup banner (env: UNITY_NO_BANNER) |
| `--non-interactive` | — | False | False | — | Disable interactive prompts. Useful in CI/CD environments. (env: UNITY_NON_INTERACTIVE) |
| `--quiet` | — | False | False | — | Suppress informational output (env: UNITY_QUIET) |
| `--verbose` | — | False | False | — | Show full error details including stack traces on failure (env: UNITY_VERBOSE) |
| `--proxy` | `<url>` | False | False | — | HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS/PAC proxy URL. Examples: http://user:pass@host:8080, socks5://host:1080, pac+http://wpad/proxy.pac (env: UNITY_PROXY) |
| `--proxy-disable` | — | False | False | — | Disable proxy for this invocation, ignoring all sources |
| `--log-proxy` | — | False | False | — | Log every outbound request to proxy-request.json for this run. Off by default; typically used once when reproducing a proxy issue for support. Also settable via UNITY_LOG_PROXY=1 or the proxyRequestLogging user setting. (env: UNITY_LOG_PROXY) |
| `--no-log-proxy` | — | False | False | — | Opt out of --log-proxy / UNITY_LOG_PROXY / the persisted user setting for this run. Use when logging is enabled globally but you want one clean invocation. |

### Environment variables

| Variable | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `UNITY_FORMAT` | Mirrors --format. |
| `UNITY_NO_BANNER` | Mirrors --no-banner. |
| `UNITY_NON_INTERACTIVE` | Mirrors --non-interactive. |
| `UNITY_QUIET` | Mirrors --quiet. |
| `UNITY_VERBOSE` | Mirrors --verbose. |
| `UNITY_PROXY` | Mirrors --proxy. |
| `UNITY_LOG_PROXY` | Mirrors --log-proxy. |

### Examples exposed by help

`$ unity projects clone --vcs github --vcs-namespace my-org --vcs-repo MyGame --git-token-stdin`
`$ unity projects clone --vcs uvcs --vcs-namespace my-org --vcs-repo MyCloudProject/MyRepo --ref main`

### Exit codes

None.

### Additional help sections

#### Notes

```text
  --vcs-namespace and --vcs-repo apply to BOTH providers (there is no --git-namespace/--git-repo here).
  --ref: an all-digits UVCS ref is read as a changeset, otherwise as a branch.
  Git LFS assets are fetched automatically (needs git-lfs installed). Use --no-lfs to leave pointer files.

```


Confirm behavior with `unity projects clone --help` on the target machine before execution.

## unity projects create

- CLI version: `1.0.0-beta.2`
- Supported platforms: macos
- Aliases: None

Create a new Unity project and register it in the Hub

### Usage

`unity projects create [options] <name>`

### Subcommands

None.

### Positional arguments

| Argument | Required | Repeatable | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | True | False | Project folder name |

### Options

| Option | Value | Required | Repeatable | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--path` | `<path>` | False | False | — | Parent directory for the new project |
| `--editor-version` | `<version>` | False | False | — | Unity editor version (e.g. 6000.0.26f1, latest, lts) |
| `--template` | `<template-id>` | False | False | — | Template package name (e.g. com.unity.template.3d) |
| `-a`, `--architecture` | `<arch>` | False | False | — | Editor architecture (x86_64 or arm64) (default: "unknown") |
| `--open` | — | False | False | — | Open the project in the Editor after creation |
| `--json` | — | False | False | — | Output result as JSON |
| `--cloud` | — | False | False | — | Create and link a new Unity Cloud project |
| `--cloud-org` | `<id-or-name>` | False | False | — | Organization for the cloud project (id or name); overrides UNITY_CLOUD_ORG and the saved default (env: UNITY_CLOUD_ORG) |
| `--cloud-project` | `<id-or-name>` | False | False | — | Link to an existing cloud project (id or name) instead of creating one |
| `--vcs` | `<provider>` | False | False | — | Create and link a git repository (github or gitlab) |
| `--git-namespace` | `<name>` | False | False | — | GitHub organization or GitLab group for the repository; defaults to the authenticated user |
| `--git-repo` | `<name>` | False | False | — | Name for the remote repository; defaults to the project name |
| `--git-visibility` | `<visibility>` | False | False | — | Repository visibility: private, public, or internal (default private) |
| `--git-default-branch` | `<name>` | False | False | — | Default branch name for the new repository (default main) |
| `--git-token` | `<pat>` | False | False | — | Personal access token; prefer --git-token-stdin or env vars in CI |
| `--git-token-stdin` | — | False | False | — | Read the personal access token from stdin (CI-safe) |
| `--no-initial-commit` | — | False | False | — | Skip the automatic initial commit and push |
| `--git-lfs` | — | False | False | — | Initialize Git LFS before the first commit |
| `--vcs-region` | `<name>` | False | False | — | UVCS region for the organization's subscription (first use only). |
| `-h`, `--help` | — | False | False | — | display help for command |
| `-V`, `--version` | — | False | False | — | output the version number |
| `--format` | `<format>` | False | False | — | Output format: human, json, tsv, ndjson (env: UNITY_FORMAT) |
| `--no-banner` | — | False | False | — | Suppress the startup banner (env: UNITY_NO_BANNER) |
| `--non-interactive` | — | False | False | — | Disable interactive prompts. Useful in CI/CD environments. (env: UNITY_NON_INTERACTIVE) |
| `--quiet` | — | False | False | — | Suppress informational output (env: UNITY_QUIET) |
| `--verbose` | — | False | False | — | Show full error details including stack traces on failure (env: UNITY_VERBOSE) |
| `--proxy` | `<url>` | False | False | — | HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS/PAC proxy URL. Examples: http://user:pass@host:8080, socks5://host:1080, pac+http://wpad/proxy.pac (env: UNITY_PROXY) |
| `--proxy-disable` | — | False | False | — | Disable proxy for this invocation, ignoring all sources |
| `--log-proxy` | — | False | False | — | Log every outbound request to proxy-request.json for this run. Off by default; typically used once when reproducing a proxy issue for support. Also settable via UNITY_LOG_PROXY=1 or the proxyRequestLogging user setting. (env: UNITY_LOG_PROXY) |
| `--no-log-proxy` | — | False | False | — | Opt out of --log-proxy / UNITY_LOG_PROXY / the persisted user setting for this run. Use when logging is enabled globally but you want one clean invocation. |

### Environment variables

| Variable | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `UNITY_CLOUD_ORG` | Mirrors --cloud-org. |
| `UNITY_FORMAT` | Mirrors --format. |
| `UNITY_NO_BANNER` | Mirrors --no-banner. |
| `UNITY_NON_INTERACTIVE` | Mirrors --non-interactive. |
| `UNITY_QUIET` | Mirrors --quiet. |
| `UNITY_VERBOSE` | Mirrors --verbose. |
| `UNITY_PROXY` | Mirrors --proxy. |
| `UNITY_LOG_PROXY` | Mirrors --log-proxy. |

### Examples exposed by help

`$ unity projects create MyGame --editor-version 6000.0.30f1`
`$ unity projects create MyGame --template com.unity.template.3d --path ~/UnityProjects`
`$ unity projects create MyGame --cloud`
`$ unity projects create MyGame --cloud-project <id-or-name>`
`$ unity projects create MyGame --vcs github --git-token-stdin`
`$ unity projects create MyGame --vcs gitlab --git-namespace my-group --git-visibility private`
`$ unity projects create MyGame --vcs uvcs --cloud --vcs-region us-east`

### Exit codes

None.

## unity projects link

- CLI version: `1.0.0-beta.2`
- Supported platforms: macos
- Aliases: None

Connect a local project to its cloud or version-control link

### Usage

`unity projects link [options] [command]`

### Subcommands

| Name | Aliases | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `cloud` | — | Connect a local project to a Unity Cloud project (creates one, or links an existing one with --cloud-project) |
| `vcs` | — | Publish a local project to a new GitHub or GitLab repository |

### Positional arguments

None.

### Options

| Option | Value | Required | Repeatable | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| Argument | Required | Repeatable | Description |

| `pattern` | True | False | Project name, fuzzy title pattern, glob, or path (defaults to current directory) |

| Option | Value | Required | Repeatable | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--editor-version` | `<version>` | False | False | — | Override project Editor version (e.g. 2021.3.4f1) (env: UNITY_EDITOR_VERSION) |
| `-e`, `--editor-path` | `<path>` | False | False | — | Use this Unity Editor application path |
| `-a`, `--architecture` | `<arch>` | False | False | — | Editor architecture (x86_64 or arm64) (default: "unknown", env: UNITY_ARCHITECTURE) |
| `--build-target` | `<target>` | False | False | — | Pass -buildTarget to Unity (e.g. StandaloneOSX) |
| `--build-target-group` | `<group>` | False | False | — | Pass -buildTargetGroup to Unity |
| `--args` | `<string>` | False | False | — | Extra arguments passed to Unity |
| `-h`, `--help` | — | False | False | — | display help for command |
| `-V`, `--version` | — | False | False | — | output the version number |
| `--format` | `<format>` | False | False | — | Output format: human, json, tsv, ndjson (env: UNITY_FORMAT) |
| `--no-banner` | — | False | False | — | Suppress the startup banner (env: UNITY_NO_BANNER) |
| `--non-interactive` | — | False | False | — | Disable interactive prompts. Useful in CI/CD environments. (env: UNITY_NON_INTERACTIVE) |
| `--quiet` | — | False | False | — | Suppress informational output (env: UNITY_QUIET) |
| `--verbose` | — | False | False | — | Show full error details including stack traces on failure (env: UNITY_VERBOSE) |
| `--proxy` | `<url>` | False | False | — | HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS/PAC proxy URL. Examples: http://user:pass@host:8080, socks5://host:1080, pac+http://wpad/proxy.pac (env: UNITY_PROXY) |
| `--proxy-disable` | — | False | False | — | Disable proxy for this invocation, ignoring all sources |
| `--log-proxy` | — | False | False | — | Log every outbound request to proxy-request.json for this run. Off by default; typically used once when reproducing a proxy issue for support. Also settable via UNITY_LOG_PROXY=1 or the proxyRequestLogging user setting. (env: UNITY_LOG_PROXY) |
| `--no-log-proxy` | — | False | False | — | Opt out of --log-proxy / UNITY_LOG_PROXY / the persisted user setting for this run. Use when logging is enabled globally but you want one clean invocation. |

### Environment variables

| Variable | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `UNITY_EDITOR_VERSION` | Mirrors --editor-version. |
| `UNITY_ARCHITECTURE` | Mirrors -a, --architecture. |
| `UNITY_FORMAT` | Mirrors --format. |
| `UNITY_NO_BANNER` | Mirrors --no-banner. |
| `UNITY_NON_INTERACTIVE` | Mirrors --non-interactive. |
| `UNITY_QUIET` | Mirrors --quiet. |
| `UNITY_VERBOSE` | Mirrors --verbose. |
| `UNITY_PROXY` | Mirrors --proxy. |
| `UNITY_LOG_PROXY` | Mirrors --log-proxy. |

### Examples exposed by help

`$ unity projects open`
`$ unity projects open "My Game"`
`$ unity projects open mgame`
`$ unity projects open "My Game*"`
`$ unity projects open /path/to/project`

### Exit codes

None.

### Additional help sections

#### Resolves the project argument in order

```text
  1. Exact path or name match in the Hub registry
  2. Glob pattern match (e.g. "My Game*")
  3. Fuzzy title match (e.g. "mgame" matches "My Game")
  4. Falls back to treating the argument as a file system path

```


Confirm behavior with `unity projects open --help` on the target machine before execution.

## unity projects require

- CLI version: `1.0.0-beta.2`
- Supported platforms: macos
- Aliases: None

Assert that the required editor version is installed, installing it if necessary

### Usage

`unity projects require [options] [pathOrName]`

### Subcommands

None.

### Positional arguments

| Argument | Required | Repeatable | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `pathOrName` | True | False | Path or name of a Unity project (defaults to current directory) |

### Options

| Option | Value | Required | Repeatable | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-y`, `--yes` | — | False | False | — | Skip confirmation prompt and install automatically |
| `--json` | — | False | False | — | Output result as JSON |
| `-h`, `--help` | — | False | False | — | display help for command |
| `-V`, `--version` | — | False | False | — | output the version number |
| `--format` | `<format>` | False | False | — | Output format: human, json, tsv, ndjson (env: UNITY_FORMAT) |
| `--no-banner` | — | False | False | — | Suppress the startup banner (env: UNITY_NO_BANNER) |
| `--non-interactive` | — | False | False | — | Disable interactive prompts. Useful in CI/CD environments. (env: UNITY_NON_INTERACTIVE) |
| `--quiet` | — | False | False | — | Suppress informational output (env: UNITY_QUIET) |
| `--verbose` | — | False | False | — | Show full error details including stack traces on failure (env: UNITY_VERBOSE) |
| `--proxy` | `<url>` | False | False | — | HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS/PAC proxy URL. Examples: http://user:pass@host:8080, socks5://host:1080, pac+http://wpad/proxy.pac (env: UNITY_PROXY) |
| `--proxy-disable` | — | False | False | — | Disable proxy for this invocation, ignoring all sources |
| `--log-proxy` | — | False | False | — | Log every outbound request to proxy-request.json for this run. Off by default; typically used once when reproducing a proxy issue for support. Also settable via UNITY_LOG_PROXY=1 or the proxyRequestLogging user setting. (env: UNITY_LOG_PROXY) |
| `--no-log-proxy` | — | False | False | — | Opt out of --log-proxy / UNITY_LOG_PROXY / the persisted user setting for this run. Use when logging is enabled globally but you want one clean invocation. |

## unity projects unlink
